# Stock Inventory Valuation Pivot

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module extends the functionality of stock inventory valuation report to
add a pivot view.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

To use this module, you need to:

1. Go to *Inventory > Reporting > Inventory Valuation*.
2. Now you can see the report result in a pivot view.
3. You can also filter the results prior to a given date-time.
